case_title: KIMBERLY PAROLARI VS. PACIFIC EQUITY ONE ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY PAROLARI, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITY ONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED SEP-07-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITY ONE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-25-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,075.00 FILED BY PAROLARI, KIMBERLY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITY ONE HULBUSH, TED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED OCT-10-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITY ONE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO TED HULBUSH BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-25-2011 AT 3:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAROLARI, KIMBERLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC EQUITY ONE $1,075.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,210.00, THE CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, TED HULBUSH, IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
